_about: Reader-supported site. The user does ONE thing: paste a crypto wallet address (or GitHub username) here. Every page auto-renders support widgets, QR codes, GitHub Sponsors button. No affiliate signup, no KYC, no approvals.

btc.label: Bitcoin
btc._after_paste: your BTC bech32 address (starts with bc1)

github_sponsors._note: User just enables GitHub Sponsors in https://github.com/sponsors (one click). I auto-render the Sponsor button across the site.

adsterra._about: Adsterra is the lowest-friction ad network: instant approval, no KYC until $100 payout, $5 minimum payout, supports crypto payout. User signs up at https://www.adsterra.com/ (~3 min) and pastes their banner/popup key here.
adsterra._after_paste: your Adsterra banner script key, e.g. 'abc123def456'

carbon_ads._about: Carbon Ads: developer/AI audience, $25 minimum payout. ~5 min signup. Paste your serve ID here.

tip_goal._about: Optional goal widget. Set a monthly target and the site shows progress bar.
